tasks.subject: [fix-chat-streaming-and-model-selector-bugs] [P1] Verify typecheck and full test suite pass
tasks.description:
## Objective

Run the full typecheck and test suite to verify both bug fixes and new tests integrate correctly with the rest of the codebase.

## Commands to Run

```bash
pnpm typecheck
pnpm test -- --run
```

## Expected Results

1. `pnpm typecheck` exits with code 0 and no new type errors
2. `pnpm test -- --run` exits with code 0 and all tests pass, including:
   - Existing tests in `use-chat-session-relay.test.ts` (no regressions)
   - New streaming guard test in `use-chat-session-relay.test.ts`
   - New `use-session-status.test.ts` (all 3 test cases)
   - All other existing tests across client and server

## Troubleshooting

If typecheck fails:
- Check that `useEffect` was added to the React import in `use-session-status.ts`
- Verify no unused imports were introduced
- Ensure the convergence effect dependency array types match (optional chaining on `session?.model` etc.)

If tests fail:
- Check mock transport shapes match what the hooks expect
- Verify QueryClient configuration in test wrappers
- Ensure `createMockTransport` overrides are correctly typed

## Acceptance Criteria

1. `pnpm typecheck` passes with exit code 0
2. `pnpm test -- --run` passes with exit code 0
3. No regressions in existing test suites
tasks.activeForm: Verifying typecheck and full test suite pass
